Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-EasyTree/Makefile

Modified: head/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-EasyTree/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-EasyTree/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:14:56 2014	(r352343)
+++ head/textproc/p5-XML-Parser-EasyTree/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:15:01 2014	(r352344)
@@ -7,9 +7,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Easier tree style for XML::Parser
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-Parser>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-Parser
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
